item.name: Brushed-up Krile
item.description:
She is not to be brushed off in the face of danger.

Use item to acquire the brushed-up Krile minion.
item.tooltip:
I'm eager to put my
pictomancy to the proof.
   - Krile
item.specialactiondescription: Reduces action points of all enemies within range by 30% of the maximum value.

obj.n: We Who Are About to Set Sail Salute You
